A '''Frost Sprite''' was a type of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]]. One Frost Sprite, [[Odra]], the "Duchess of Sleet," lived on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]].<ref name="Season Scepter" />

{{Species-stub}}
